name: riptide-ria-deck-toolchain
description: Build toolchain for the Riptide RIA master deck and technical documentation

scripts.gate: python qa/contrast_gate.py out/Riptide-RIA-Master-Deck.pptx && python qa/layout_gate.py out/Riptide-RIA-Master-Deck.pptx
scripts.all: npm run diagrams && npm run deck && npm run doc && npm run gate
